items.title: What people are saying

Travel Ask World. Good Vibes Tribe 11:11 · I'm Not What Happened To Me. 🌿Hidden among the rice terraces of Bali, this boutique hotel blends seamlessly into nature: villas made of natural bamboo, panoramic views over lush green valleys, and sunsets you c

comment “Bali” for link to this property we found in Ubud with the most gorgeous rice field views 🔗🌴😍
•
•
•
[Bamboo house, Ubud, Bali, rice field view, hotel, Airbnb, Airbnb finds, hotel finds, couple, travel]

Save this place to your Bali bucketlist, the perfect villa to embrace the morning with your loved one, surrounded by endless rice fields and the majestic view of Mount Agung 🌾⛰️✨ #bali #magichills #honeymoon #beautifulhotels #earthpix

🌿Hidden among the rice terraces of Bali, this boutique hotel blends seamlessly into nature: villas made of natural bamboo, panoramic views over lush green valleys, and sunsets you can’t look away from.

Each villa is a private world with its own pool, where you can swim during the day overlooking the rice fields. In the evening, the main pool is softly lit, sparkling like a sky full of stars. Breakfast is served прямо in the villa, the restaurant focuses on fresh local ingredients with beautiful presentation, and the spa is set within nature, with open views and the sounds of the jungle — everything feels incredibly Instagrammable, aesthetic, and beautiful.

The main highlight is the bamboo architecture: organic shapes, high ceilings, and a feeling that the boundaries between indoors and nature simply disappear. 

📍 Bambootel Sawah View, Bali @bambootelresorts
Resort Instagramable View Sawah?!

✨ BALI VILLA DREAM IN CANGGU ✨
Just stayed at one of the most stunning villas in Canggu and I’m still not over it 🫶🌴

🏡 This private villa had:
💦 A huge swimming pool perfect for chilling all day
🛋️ An open & airy living area
🛏️ 3 spacious bedrooms, all with individual jungle-themed bathrooms 🍃🚿
🛁 One massive pool-facing bathroom to soak in style
🐠 A cute little fish pond that added such a peaceful vibe
🍽️ And a super large kitchen (yes, big enough to cook & host with your squad!)

And guess what? It’s just 10 minutes from Finns Beach Club 🏖️🚗 — yes, partying & peace in one package! 🎉🌺

💸 The whole villa cost me ₹11K per night (for the entire place!) but if you’re a group of 4–6, it’s barely ₹3K per person or even less 🙌🔥

This spot is PERFECT for:
🌞 Chill days by the pool
📸 Reels with a jungle vibe
🍹 Pre-drinks before heading to beach clubs
🌙 Late-night convos in the open living area

expanded_element.title: How to Choose What Neighborhood to Book Your Bali Canggu Hotel In
expanded_element.description: What area of Canggu is best to stay in? Batu Bolong is best for nightlife, Berawa for remote work and food, and Pererenan for peace and easier day trips.

items.title: Is Canggu worth staying at?

expanded_element.title: Is Canggu Bali worth visiting? - Facebook
expanded_element.description: The reality is that Canggu is awesome, sure it has its challenges, but it's one of the best places to learn to surf on Earth, has an excellent nightlife scene and a great restaurant scene, and there's plenty to actually do in the area. It also has the world's best beach club.

items.title: How expensive is Canggu, Bali?

expanded_element.title: Cost of Living in Bali 2026: Monthly Budgets & Real Costs
expanded_element.description: A room in a guesthouse costs USD 250–400 per month. A private one-bedroom villa or apartment runs USD 600–1,200. Mid-range villas with pools start around USD 1,200–2,000. Canggu and Seminyak cost more than Sanur, Tabanan, or Amed.
